name: /standards-diff exits zero with no_changes message when current and upstream snapshots are identical
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'r: same\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'r: same\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'no_changes' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
